description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a large rectangular plot of green lawn, with a straight driveway leading from a main road to the front entrance. The structure features a simple, elongated rectangular footprint with a low-pitched gable roof, and a small extension or garage attached to one side. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in painted siding or stucco, and the roof is a muted gray. Windows are arranged in a regular, somewhat symmetrical pattern on the front and sides, with a prominent main entrance facing the driveway. The property is surrounded by open grass, with no visible fencing or landscaping details.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, attached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a large grassy plot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated shape, attached garage, and the main road running alongside the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow and the continuation of the main road behind the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side extension and the driveway leading to the entrance.
